name: 02_mc_absent_ticks_below_stop_fires
description: When MC is absent, after the fail-open fix arms the stop, compute_exit_confirmation with prob_beating=None must still fire when EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS consecutive qualifying ticks are seen. This fixture pins the end-state: after 3 qualifying ticks (each individually incrementing), the stop fires.

sequence.derivation: armed=True (post-fix arming). Magnitude: -2.0 <= -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10 -> TRUE. MC sanity: prob_beating=None -> mc_sanity_ok=True (None treated as pass). Condition met. new_count = 0+1 = 1. Hit = (1 >= 3) = False.
Same conditions. new_count = 2+1 = 3. Hit = (3 >= EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS=3) = True. STOP FIRES.
